name: @soltrade/trading-engine
description: Runtime trading orchestrator (ADR-0001). PURE domain kernel: owns the engine lifecycle state machine (deriveDesiredState) and the engine composition (composeTradingEngine), which assembles the runtime engine from an INJECTED, mechanism-bound substrate (apps/server paper-engine today). No fs/network/SDK — substrate is injected. Phase Engine-2 begins the physical extraction from apps/server paper-engine.
